title: Identity Match Request
description: Sent by publisher to evaluate user eligibility for packages using an opaque identity token. MUST NOT contain page context. The request_id MUST NOT correlate with any context match request_id. The package_ids MUST include ALL active packages for the buyer, not just those on the current page, to prevent set-correlation attacks.

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

$schema.description: Optional schema URI for validation. Ignored at runtime.

protocol_version.description: TMP protocol version. Allows receivers to handle semantic differences across versions.

request_id.description: Unique request identifier. MUST NOT correlate with any context match request_id.

user_token.description: Opaque token from an identity provider (ID5, LiveRamp, UID2) or publisher-generated

uid_type.description: Type of the user identifier. Tells the buyer which identity graph to resolve against, avoiding trial-and-error matching.

consent.description: Privacy consent signals. Buyers in regulated jurisdictions MUST NOT process the user token without consent information.

gdpr.description: Whether GDPR applies to this request.

tcf_consent.description: IAB TCF v2.2 consent string. Present when gdpr is true.

us_privacy.description: US Privacy string (CCPA). Deprecated in favor of GPP but still widely used.

package_ids.description: ALL active package identifiers for this buyer at this publisher. MUST include every active package, not just those on the current page, to prevent correlation with Context Match requests.
